creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Anton Sayetsky from comment #2)

Please don't get this wrong. Having a full-fledged localisation in mplayer would be great! Proper NLS support (as in the packages you mentioned) is the way to go here. The issue with mplayer is that it does not support NLS. Instead, you have select one language via a configure switch during build.
